Package io.forja.components.selection.fxSlider

Class FxSlider.Builder

java.lang.Object
io.forja.builder.FxNodeBuilder<FxSlider,FxSlider.Builder>
io.forja.components.selection.fxSlider.FxSlider.Builder
Enclosing class:
FxSlider
public static class FxSlider.Builder extends FxNodeBuilder<FxSlider,FxSlider.Builder>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxSlider.

Defaults:

  • min / max — 0 / 100
  • value — 0
  • step — 1
  • decimals — 0
  • prefix / suffix — empty
  • showValue — false
  • showTickMarks / showTickLabels — false

    • build

      public FxSlider build()
      Description copied from class: FxNodeBuilder
      Constructs and returns the configured component.

      Implementations must call FxNodeBuilder.applyBase(Node) on the constructed node before returning it.

      Specified by:
      build in class FxNodeBuilder<FxSlider,FxSlider.Builder>
      Returns:
      the built component
